notes: Addressed all three review issues: (1) Added JSDoc to createIndex documenting the lifetime contract — callers must ensure elements are deleted from the ReactiveUnionSet or the owning context is disposed, otherwise per-element effects persist indefinitely. This surfaces the existing cleanup mechanisms (onCleanup bulk stop + per-element stop in delete handler) and makes the invariant explicit. (2) Added a comment above the onTrack detection block explaining that onTrack fires if the mapper reads reactive deps, enabling the static vs reactive fast-path. (3) Removed the unnecessary eff.onTrack = undefined line after eff.run() — the property is never read again so zeroing it out was a no-op code smell. All 365 core tests pass; monorepo build succeeds.
